title: Low Fire, Shield & More
description: Makes shield, food, totems, rockets, potions and fire lower and also adds eating animation
body:
![differences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XpUmrAxt/images/a4af38c2350a5e5b25700f4b332abb9a086f2675.gif) | | | |:---:|:---:| |![Fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XpUmrAxt/images/93c625f4bec39798f87c7b521536d469fd7cd3c9.gif) | ![Food animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XpUmrAxt/images/ed9103b096b9252bf0b01d38e112bd3d9f267c32.gif) | # For versions 1.21.4 and newer there is eating animation on every food --- ### Examples items affected: - Fire - Shields - Food (with added eating animation) - Totems - Fire charges - Rockets - Potions - Compasses - Clocks - Ender Pearls - AND MORE.. --- ### If you're using this, you might also like [Lower Grass](https://modrinth.com/project/EYDx6PXJ) ### Contact Questions, suggestions or any issues? You can reach me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/2eCpbXadsC). ### Credits:
Food animations from [Eating animation RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack) with the permission of the creator
**Feel free to use this Resource Pack in modpacks**
